prompt: A bold, high-impact fast-food advertisement poster for McDonald's, designed in a dramatic commercial food-photography style. The layout is a single vertical poster with a warm beige textured background, red and yellow brand colors, energetic paint splashes, flying crumbs, and glossy sauce droplets. In the upper left corner, place the iconic red square logo with yellow arches. Across the top half, feature a huge all-caps headline in heavy block typography reading BITE INTO PERFECTION., with the first line in black and the second line in vivid red, slightly angled and overlapping for maximum impact. Directly beneath it, add a slanted yellow brushstroke banner containing the subheadline in black uppercase text: DOUBLE THE CHEESE. DOUBLE THE CRAVING.. The main subject is an extreme close-up hero shot of a double cheeseburger occupying the lower right and center of the poster: a glossy sesame seed top bun, orange creamy sauce under the bun, chopped white onions, crisp green leaf lettuce, 2 thick char-grilled beef patties, and 2 layers of molten cheddar cheese dramatically dripping over both patties and down the sides, with a toasted bottom bun visible. Behind and around the burger, add explosive red sauce splashes and golden cheese-like droplets to create motion and indulgence. On the left side, include a large black circular price badge with a rough yellow outline displaying ₹179 in oversized yellow numerals and a white rupee symbol. Near the lower left of the burger, place a stacked product label in bold block text reading DOUBLE CHEESE STACK, with mixed red, black, and yellow rectangular text blocks and a small curved arrow pointing toward the burger. At the bottom left, add a rounded yellow call-to-action button with black text reading "ORDER NOW →". Along the bottom edge, include a red footer bar with small white app and website details, including "Available on app" and "mcdonalds.in". Use ultra-detailed food styling, glossy highlights, crisp texture on the meat and bun, dramatic studio lighting, shallow depth of field, commercial poster composition, and a premium appetizing fast-food ad aesthetic.
